revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Inspired by {{tl|tlx}} (template link expanded), this template takes a [[WP:SC|shortcut]], converts it to uppercase, and displays it with brackets in a [[WP:CODE|{{tag|code}}]] tag. If no prefix (e.g. MOS:, H: or WT:) is added, the [[WP:ALIAS|WP: alias]] is added. == Parameters == * {{''sclx''|''SHORTCUT''}} The template takes one unnamed parameter, ''SHORTCUT'', that can be any uppercase shortcut. If no prefix is included, the [[WP:ALIAS|WP: alias]] is added. If ''SHORTCUT'' is entered in lowercase, it will be converted to uppercase. == Usage == {{tbullet|sclx|BASIC}} {{tbullet|sclx|gng}} {{tbullet|sclx|MOS:ENGVAR}} == Limitations == * Will only work with shortcuts that are uppercase; will not work with mixed case shortcuts, e.g. [[WP:Source list]]. == See also == ===Other formatting templates=== {{#lsth:Template:Template-linking_templates|Other formatting templates}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Internal link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Inspired by {{tl|tlx}} (template link expanded), this template takes a [[WP:SC|shortcut]], converts it to uppercase, and displays it with brackets in a [[WP:CODE|{{tag|code}}]] tag. If no prefix (e.g. MOS:, H: or WT:) is added, the [[WP:ALIAS|WP: alias]] is added. == Parameters == * {{''sclx''|''SHORTCUT''}} The template takes one unnamed parameter, ''SHORTCUT'', that can be any uppercase shortcut. If no prefix is included, the [[WP:ALIAS|WP: alias]] is added. If ''SHORTCUT'' is entered in lowercase, it will be converted to uppercase. == Usage == {{tbullet|sclx|BASIC}} {{tbullet|sclx|gng}} {{tbullet|sclx|MOS:ENGVAR}} == Limitations == * Will only work with shortcuts that are uppercase; will not work with mixed case shortcuts, e.g. [[WP:Source list]]. == See also == ===Other formatting templates=== {{#lsth:Template:Template-linking_templates|Other formatting templates}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Internal link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
